prompt: Build a responsive profile form for an existing app.
required_checks: confirm or default locale, theme, stack, viewport floor, performance posture, and architecture pairing
run project assimilation before generating UI
forbidden_behaviors: invent a design system when project tokens exist
claim runtime Core Web Vitals from static code
grader: rubric: output uses reference defaults, records deviations, and discloses static/runtime limits
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Review a Blazor component for responsive and accessibility quality.
required_checks: load the Blazor extension when signals match
separate static, DOM, visual, a11y-tool, and runtime evidence
auto-dispatch architecture drift review only when paired model exists
forbidden_behaviors: flag runtime-only performance metrics as statically verified
skip extension loading for Blazor-specific evidence
grader: rubric: findings cite reference sections, loaded extension context, and honest verification layers
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
